name: Dream Neighborhood — Schools
description: Schools tab: school district, quality index, and real per-school federal safety data (NCES CCD + U.S. DOE CRDC), nationwide, on Postgres + PostGIS.

PGSSLMODE.description: Force SSL for the managed Postgres connection.

EMBED_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Shared secret for the embeddable-widget admin (/embed-admin) and /api/embed/admin. Leave unset to disable the admin.
